title: Streaming Chat
description: A live streaming chat powered by Llama 3.3 70B via Groq. Experiment with system prompts and see how they shape the model's responses.

title: Token Visualizer
description: See exactly how your text is tokenised before it reaches the model. Each token gets a unique colour — great for understanding prompt costs.

title: Model Comparison
description: Run the same prompt across multiple Groq models simultaneously. Compare outputs, time-to-first-token, and throughput side by side.

title: Prompt Builder
description: Visually construct structured prompts using typed blocks (role, context, instruction, examples, format, constraints). Load templates or build from scratch, then run live.
